steps: Update SessionStatus type in src/features/workspace/types/index.ts from 'running' | 'paused' | 'completed' | 'errored' to 'running' | 'awaiting' | 'completed' | 'errored' | 'idle'
Add type alias: export type SessionStatus = SessionState (import from docs/design/tokens)
Update all Session interface usages and mock fixtures to use new states
Replace any 'paused' states with 'awaiting' or 'idle' as appropriate
Update all type guards and status checks in components
Verify with npm run type-check
Update co-located tests to cover all five states

description: Introduce ActivityEvent type and mock data
steps: Add ActivityEventType = 'edit' | 'bash' | 'read' | 'think' | 'user' to workspace types
Add ActivityEventBadge interface with kind: 'live' | 'ok' | 'failed' | 'diff' and text: string
Add ActivityEvent interface with id, type, body, at, badge? fields
Create mock data file with sample events covering all five event types
Create mock events covering all four badge kinds (live, ok, failed, diff)
Export types from workspace/types/index.ts
Add unit tests for type definitions and mock data structure
Create src/features/workspace/components/AgentActivity/StatusDot.tsx
Add props interface: { state: SessionStatus; size?: number; glow?: boolean }
Implement conditional rendering: hollow ring for idle/completed, solid for running/awaiting/errored
Add 3-ring outer shadow glow at ~45% alpha using stateToken from docs/design/tokens.ts
Implement pulse animation: 2s for running, 1.4s for awaiting, none for others
Add explicit return type on component export
Create StatusDot.test.tsx with tests for all five states, size variants, and glow toggle
Verify visual appearance against UNIFIED.md §4.1 table

description: Rewrite StatusCard header to use StatusDot
steps: Update src/features/workspace/components/AgentActivity/StatusCard.tsx
Replace existing status symbol/label rendering with StatusDot component
Layout: StatusDot + bold title + 'agent · branch' subtitle + ⋯ menu
Remove ALL state-label text (no '● running', no 'Status: X') per UNIFIED.md §8 anti-pattern
Delete statusConfig.label and statusConfig.symbol code paths
Update StatusCard.test.tsx to verify no state text appears for any state
Test that StatusDot correctly reflects state changes
Verify with npm run test and visual check

description: Implement NowCard component for running state
steps: Create src/features/workspace/components/AgentActivity/NowCard.tsx
Add props interface: { event: ActivityEvent }
Implement bordered card with type icon (Material Symbols: edit_note/terminal/visibility/auto_awesome/person)
Add uppercase type label, relative timestamp, body text
Add inline LIVE badge with primary-container on glass styling
Apply proper spacing and surface-container-high background per design tokens
Create NowCard.test.tsx with tests for all event types and badge rendering
Verify matches UNIFIED.md §5.2 visual specification
Create src/features/workspace/components/AgentActivity/ApprovalCard.tsx
Add props interface: { question?: string; onApprove(): void; onDeny(): void }
Implement 'AWAITING YOU' label in uppercase
Add primary-gradient Approve button
Add ghost Deny button
Apply proper component styling per UNIFIED.md
Create ApprovalCard.test.tsx with button click handler tests
Test optional question prop rendering
Create src/features/workspace/components/AgentActivity/ErrorBlock.tsx
Add props interface: { message: string }
Implement 'ERROR' label in uppercase
Add bordered monospace red message block
Use error semantic color tokens from design system
Apply proper spacing and typography per UNIFIED.md
Create ErrorBlock.test.tsx with message rendering tests
Test long error message wrapping and overflow handling
Update PinnedMetrics.tsx to accept state prop
Add conditional rendering: show -- placeholders when state === 'idle'
Apply to CONTEXT and 5-HOUR USAGE meters per UNIFIED.md §4.4
Document divergence from Claude Design prototype in JSDoc comment
Update PinnedMetrics.test.tsx to verify -- rendering for idle state
Test live values still render correctly for other states
Verify TURNS meter remains unaffected (always shows live value)
Create src/features/workspace/components/AgentActivity/ActivityFeed.tsx
Add props interface: { events: ActivityEvent[] }
Implement vertical timeline with 1px rail (rgba(74,68,79,0.4) per §5.2)
Add Material Symbols icons for each event type (edit_note/terminal/visibility/auto_awesome/person)
Render uppercase type label, right-aligned relative timestamp
Render body text below icon node
Implement inline badges (LIVE, OK green, FAILED N/M red, +N -N diff)
Style think event bodies in italic with wrapping curly quotes
Add absolute timestamp in title tooltip on hover per §4.2
Create ActivityFeed.test.tsx with tests for all event types and badge kinds
Test timeline rail rendering and icon alignment

description: Wire up conditional state card rendering in AgentActivity
steps: Update AgentActivity.tsx to import NowCard, ApprovalCard, ErrorBlock
Add conditional slot rendering above ActivityFeed based on session.state
running state: render NowCard with currentAction or events[0]
awaiting state: render ApprovalCard with onApprove/onDeny handlers
errored state: render ErrorBlock with error message
completed/idle states: render no state card
Update AgentActivity.test.tsx integration tests for all state transitions
Verify only one state card renders at a time

description: Replace ToolCalls with ActivityFeed in AgentActivity
steps: Update AgentActivity.tsx to replace ToolCalls component with ActivityFeed
Map existing toolCalls data to ActivityEvent format
Update panel layout: StatusCard -> Meters -> State Slot -> ActivityFeed
Verify 'ACTIVITY' section header renders above feed
Update AgentActivity integration tests to use ActivityEvent mocks
Remove ToolCalls.tsx and ToolCalls.test.tsx (or mark for deletion in next feature)
Verify layout matches UNIFIED.md §5.2 panel composition

description: Fold agent-status components into workspace and cleanup
steps: Identify unique components in src/features/agent-status/components/ not duplicated in workspace/
Move or merge unique logic into workspace/components/AgentActivity/
Update all imports across codebase from agent-status to workspace paths
Run npm run type-check to catch any missing import updates
